summary: FIX. Canonical release verification is incomplete because the full negative template-checker matrix was terminated by the host after 900.5 seconds without a terminal result. All preceding release gates passed; no semantic PASS is claimed from Wave 1 or from the partial matrix.

artifacts.name: release-gate-evidence.md
artifacts.content:
# Release Gate Evidence

Outcome: `FIX`

## Authentication

- Authenticated the 17,857-byte specialist contract at raw digest `sha256:0f487cf0881b64098a2a2d3d8268b3880754bab696d9aacce81ce17c12c52bf8`; blueprint digest binding was `sha256:0a6d06841ce39cc83a3d892bee8cc7415cc6f4dc7f000699514823f07572d0ac`.
- Authenticated the 10,918-byte preparation handoff at raw digest `sha256:42bd964328a05a06e12170980d93ef317be1d9361a6096079499c3c5442aedb4` and its 9,220-byte inline digest ledger at raw digest `sha256:ba585a01af7878377ef99e50fd9f5d25f939215476f518363dd28262c44d4d13` before semantic use.
- Authenticated all 21 contract-declared contexts by exact raw byte count and SHA-256; all matched.
- Authenticated the approval, launch authorization, package-verification receipt, and prelaunch-audit handoff by their ledger-bound raw byte counts and SHA-256 digests; all matched the Candidate A pair `sha256:d8ebaaa5e5fd1fe5b6c575c5b53d64b4d495ce5007c987e9189c53614a401266` / `sha256:651bdc5ab823d8fb490b5c48f7212d07f042fc1cafbd07efc3460b9954001f7e`.
- Independently ran `verifySpecialistPackage`; verification passed and all nine materialized package files matched the rendered files, raw bindings, compilation digest, and package digest.

## Containment

- Native realpath resolution proved `C:\Users\garre\OneDrive\DOCUME~1\PORTAB~1\LOCAL~1\NPM-CA~1` resolves to `C:\Users\garre\OneDrive\Documents\Portable Best Practices\.local\npm-cache`.
- Native filesystem identity matched for both spellings: device `1711846478`, inode `39406496739764899`.
- Before each canonical command, `TEMP`, `TMP`, `TMPDIR`, and `npm_config_cache` used the verified short-path spelling and resolved to the authorized target.
- Every npm gate inherited `npm_config_offline=true`, `npm_config_audit=false`, and `npm_config_fund=false`.

## Completed Gates

- `npm.cmd run verify`: PASS in 41.1 seconds.
- Format check: PASS, 72 files checked, no fixes applied.
- Lint: PASS, 60 files checked, no fixes applied.
- Typecheck: PASS.
- Kernel tests: PASS, 353 passed, 0 failed, including strict specialist schema coverage, all six specialist golden selections, path-validation regressions, and V11 host-containment regressions.
- V10 dogfood evidence check: PASS.
- V11 dogfood evidence check: PASS with the exact Candidate A compilation/package pair and passing launch authorization.
- Package dry run: PASS.
- Offline installed-consumer check: PASS, including public TypeScript host compilation/execution and approval-bound package verification.
- `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\check-template.ps1`: PASS; output was `Template check passed.`

## Incomplete Gate

- `powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\test-check-template.ps1`: INCOMPLETE.
- Its independent preflight passed, including exact short-path inheritance and native resolution for all temporary roots.
- The matrix emitted only expected `PASS` cases through `rail table missing action field` but did not reach its terminal suite result.
- The host terminated the command after 900.5 seconds with exit 124. Partial case output is not treated as semantic PASS.

## Failed Attempts

- The first in-memory ledger-hash command used an unsupported Windows PowerShell `ConvertFrom-Json -Depth` option; the compatible retry authenticated the ledger exactly.
- PowerShell provider path resolution preserved the 8.3 spelling and could not establish alias identity; native Node realpath plus device/inode comparison established the required identity.
- The first native Node preflight had a command-line quoting syntax error; the corrected read-only preflight passed before any canonical command.

## Verdict

The stop condition applies because one canonical gate did not complete reproducibly. `verify.release-gates` is not complete and release approval must not proceed from this handoff.

risks: The forcibly terminated checker process may have left a generated `sc-ct-*` fixture directory inside the authorized `.local/npm-cache` scope.
The uncompleted negative checker matrix leaves AC11 and the canonical release criterion unverified.
followUps: Do not approve or integrate Candidate A from this handoff.
Re-run the complete `test-check-template.ps1` matrix from freshly authenticated revision-21 bindings with a host timeout exceeding 900.5 seconds; do not reuse partial case output.
Before rerunning or cleaning generated fixtures, confirm that no terminated checker child remains active and restrict any cleanup to the script-owned `.local/npm-cache/sc-ct-*` scope.
